endpoint.description: Get VEBA (Vehicle Electronic Booking & Authorization) statistics for dashboard monitoring. Returns booking counts, leakage prevention attempts, and settlement performance metrics.

body.message: Server error: connection to server at "165.232.128.208", port 5432 failed

bookings_today.description: Total number of VEBA bookings recorded today (current date)

leakage_attempts.description: Total number of leakage prevention attempts detected today (unauthorized listing/tendering)

settlement_p95.description: 95th percentile settlement time formatted as human-readable string (e.g., '18m' for 18 minutes)
settlement_p95.calculation: PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) over last 7 days of settlement times

settlement_p95_minutes.description: 95th percentile settlement time in minutes as numeric value for calculations
settlement_p95_minutes.calculation: PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) over last 7 days of settlement times

columns.settlement_time_minutes: INTEGER - Time to settle in minutes (for p95 calculation)

react_example.description: Fetch VEBA statistics for dashboard card

frontend_integration.important_note: The response wraps data in a {status, message, data} structure. Access statistics via response.data, NOT response directly.

bookings_today.description: Counts all booking events recorded in the current day
bookings_today.reset_time: Resets at midnight (00:00) server time each day

leakage_attempts.description: Counts unauthorized listing or tendering attempts detected by the system
leakage_attempts.reset_time: Resets at midnight (00:00) server time each day
leakage_attempts.use_case: Monitor governance compliance and fraud prevention effectiveness

settlement_p95.description: 95th percentile of settlement times over the last 7 days
settlement_p95.use_case: Track settlement performance - 95% of settlements complete within this time
settlement_p95.interpretation: Lower is better - indicates faster settlement processing

notes: Data is fetched from PostgreSQL database in real-time on each request
Bookings and leakage attempts count only today's events (DATE(created_at) = CURRENT_DATE)
Settlement p95 is calculated over the last 7 days to provide a rolling performance metric
Settlement time is only tracked for 'booking' events, not 'leakage_attempt' events
Response format differs from /metrics/api/performance - note the 'data' wrapper
This endpoint is separate from API performance metrics

related_endpoints.description: Get API performance metrics (latency, errors, Kafka lag, uptime)
Get all active VEBA token subscriptions

sample_migration.description: Creates dll_veba_statistics table and populates with sample data
